privileged_info_summary: The task reorganizes a Nuxeo Platform 10.10 workspace at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects containing three documents: 'Annual Report 2023' (PDF), 'Q3 Status Report' (Note), and 'Project Proposal' (PDF). Documents are created from synthetic PDF files stored locally in the environment's data directory. The task requires creating two folders ('Financial Reports' and 'Proposals') and moving the three documents into appropriate folders by title. All metadata claims regarding document titles, folder names, and workspace path are correct and verified against setup scripts.
